title: No Pumpkin Overlay
description: This Pack Will Make The Carved Pumpkin Overlay Go Away!
body:
# No Pumpkin Overlay

This pack will completely get rid of the pumpkin overlay that you get when you put on a carved pumpkin.

## How Will This Make A Difference

When you are in the End and you don't want to look at enderman you can just put on a pumpkin and you can still see 100% of your screen!

### PvP
_This can also help with pvp if someone makes you wear a pumpkin mask on_

# Check The Gallery
If you want to see how the pack looks in game 
(Both screenshots were taken with the pumpkin mask on)
